meta.title: Backblaze Labs
meta.homeTitle: Backblaze Labs — Open Source Tools & Integrations for B2
meta.tagline: Open source experiments, integrations, and tools built on Backblaze B2.
meta.description: Curated open source projects built on Backblaze B2 — SDKs, agent skills, IDE extensions, reference pipelines, and community integrations.

integrations.title: MLflow
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as the MLflow artifact store.
integrations.description: MLflow's tracking server supports Backblaze B2 directly via the S3-compatible API. Configure `MLFLOW_S3_ENDPOINT_URL` and your B2 credentials, and your runs, models, and artifacts persist to B2 — no extra plugin, fully documented upstream.

integrations.title: CVAT
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as a cloud storage backend for CVAT.
integrations.description: CVAT — the open source computer vision annotation tool — supports Backblaze B2 as an S3-compatible cloud storage. Attach B2 buckets to your projects to store annotation source data and exported results without paying egress fees.

integrations.title: Genblaze
integrations.tagline: Generative AI media pipelines, with provenance.
integrations.description: Open source Python SDK that orchestrates generative AI media pipelines across video, audio, and image providers — with built-in provenance for every output, persisted to Backblaze B2.

integrations.title: B2 Cloud Storage Skill
integrations.tagline: Manage B2 from Claude in natural language.
integrations.description: Claude Skill for Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage management from the terminal. Manage buckets, list and search files, audit storage usage, detect stale or large objects, review security posture, and safely clean up data using natural language.

integrations.title: HF Cache Sync
integrations.tagline: Shared Hugging Face cache for teams.
integrations.description: Sync local Hugging Face cache to Backblaze B2 or S3, eliminate repeated downloads, and enable fast, consistent model access across machines and CI runners.

integrations.title: jupyter-b2
integrations.tagline: %b2 magic and fsspec backend for Jupyter.
integrations.description: Jupyter/IPython magic commands and fsspec backend for Backblaze B2. Load datasets, save models, and manage cloud storage — all from your notebook with simple %b2 commands. No boilerplate, no SDK ceremony.

integrations.title: jupyterlab-b2
integrations.tagline: Native B2 file browser inside JupyterLab.
integrations.description: JupyterLab extension that registers Backblaze B2 as a native drive — same look, same breadcrumbs, drag-and-drop upload, click-to-open, and full bucket management from the sidebar.

integrations.title: B2 for VS Code
integrations.tagline: Browse and manage B2 inside your editor.
integrations.description: Bucket explorer, auto-detected credentials, file open/download/rename/delete, Copilot tools for B2 operations, and SARIF-compatible structured logging for CI/CD — all without leaving VS Code.

integrations.title: Genblaze × GMICloud
integrations.tagline: Image-to-video pipeline in ~100 lines.
integrations.description: Sample app that composes GMICloud image and video models with Genblaze and persists every artifact to B2 with a SHA-256-verified manifest. One prompt becomes an anchor image, then fans out concurrently to three video models.

integrations.title: NVIDIA Nemotron × Genblaze
integrations.tagline: Reference pipeline with Nemotron + B2.
integrations.description: Reference pipeline showing how to use NVIDIA Nemotron models with Genblaze and persist artifacts to Backblaze B2.

integrations.title: Awesome Agent Infrastructure
integrations.tagline: Memory, sandboxes, MCP, and more.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI agent infrastructure: memory stores, vector databases, execution sandboxes, MCP servers, tool registries, observability, and evaluation tools for building and running autonomous agents.

integrations.title: Awesome ML Data Pipelines
integrations.tagline: Versioning, labeling, feature stores.
integrations.description: A curated list of ML data pipeline tools: dataset versioning, labeling, feature stores, workflow orchestration, data loaders, and storage infrastructure for training and inference.

integrations.title: Awesome Multimodal Data
integrations.tagline: Video, image, audio, 3D, robotics.
integrations.description: A curated list of multimodal AI datasets and data infrastructure: video, image, audio, 3D, and robotics data, with formats, loaders, versioning, and labeling tools for large-scale training.

integrations.title: Awesome Image Generation
integrations.tagline: Text-to-image APIs, SDKs, and tools.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI image generation APIs, SDKs, and tools including text-to-image, image editing, diffusion models, generative art systems, and multimodal AI platforms.

integrations.title: Awesome Video Generation
integrations.tagline: Text-to-video, editing, multimodal.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI video generation APIs, SDKs, and tools including text-to-video, video editing, multimodal generation, diffusion models, and generative AI platforms.

integrations.title: Awesome Audio Generation
integrations.tagline: TTS, speech synthesis, music, voice cloning.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI audio generation APIs, SDKs, and tools including text-to-speech, speech synthesis, music generation, voice cloning, sound design, and generative AI platforms.

integrations.title: Awesome Physical AI
integrations.tagline: Robotics, world models, sim-to-real.
integrations.description: A curated list of physical AI tools: robotics foundation models, world models, simulators, teleoperation, sim-to-real, and embodied AI datasets for robot learning and autonomous systems.

integrations.title: ComfyUI Cloud Storage
integrations.tagline: ComfyUI cloud storage nodes with Backblaze B2 and S3-compatible support.
integrations.description: ComfyUI cloud storage nodes with Backblaze B2 and S3-compatible support. Upload images, video, and audio, and manage AI models across machines with a unified workflow.

integrations.title: Vibe Coding Starter Kit
integrations.tagline: Starter kit for vibe coders building apps with file uploads and object storage.
integrations.description: Starter kit for vibe coders building apps with file uploads and object storage. This full-stack dashboard template integrates with Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage and includes secure upload flows, file browsing, and basic storage management.

integrations.title: Agentic RAG Starter Kit
integrations.tagline: Agentic RAG starter kit with Langchain, LanceDB, and Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: Agentic RAG vector starter kit with AI coding agent architecture, Langchain, LanceDB, and Backblaze B2 for document upload, semantic search, grounded chat, and document citations.

integrations.title: Zero-shot Image Classifier
integrations.tagline: Browser image classification with OpenAI CLIP and Transformers.js.
integrations.description: Browser-based image classification example application using OpenAI CLIP and Transformers.js. Upload images, run zero-shot classification with custom labels directly in the browser, and store images plus results in S3-compatible Backblaze B2 cloud object storage using pre-signed uploads.

integrations.title: Whisper Transcriber
integrations.tagline: Browser-based audio transcription with Whisper and Transformers.js.
integrations.description: Browser-based audio transcription using Whisper and Transformers.js, storing results in Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage.

integrations.title: Video Object Detection
integrations.tagline: Real-time browser video object detection with Transformers.js + YOLOv9.
integrations.description: Real-time video object detection monitoring demo using Transformers.js and Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage. Runs YOLOv9 fully in the browser with automatic capture intervals, no server or GPU required. Detected snapshots and metadata are stored in low cost, scalable B2 storage for analysis and retention.

integrations.title: Background Removal
integrations.tagline: Browser AI image background removal with Transformers.js and RMBG-1.4.
integrations.description: Browser-based AI image background removal app using Transformers.js and the RMBG-1.4 model, storing original and cutout images in Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage — no GPU or backend required.

integrations.title: Openclaw B2 Sync Backup
integrations.tagline: OpenClaw automatic backup and sync to Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: OpenClaw automatic backup and sync to Backblaze B2. Keep state durable across machines, restore instantly on new hardware, and roll back to previous snapshots if configs break or memory becomes corrupted.

integrations.title: Image Generation Prompt Flow
integrations.tagline: Compare GPT Image, DALL-E, Gemini, and Google Imagen prompts side by side.
integrations.description: AI image generation prompt flow example app focused on prompt engineering and prompt optimization, comparing models GPT Image, DALL-E, Gemini Nano Banana, and Google Imagen. Shows how image prompts are structured, refined, and evolved from input to final output, with clear prompt lineage for learning and experimentation.

integrations.title: Pixeltable Multimodal Data
integrations.tagline: Notebooks for managing multimodal datasets with Pixeltable and Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: Example notebooks showing how to use Pixeltable with Backblaze B2 for managing and querying multimodal datasets.

integrations.title: Meltano
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as a state backend for Meltano data pipelines.
integrations.description: Meltano supports Backblaze B2 as a state backend via its S3-compatible API. Configure `state_backend.uri` with your B2 bucket and credentials and your pipeline state persists to B2 between runs — no extra plugin, fully documented upstream.

integrations.title: Pixeltable
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as S3-compatible storage for Pixeltable's table stores.
integrations.description: Pixeltable is a declarative table-based system for multimodal AI data. Configure your B2 endpoint and credentials and Pixeltable persists tables, media, and computed columns to B2 — same path as the S3 / GCS / R2 backends.

integrations.title: B2 Action
integrations.tagline: The Backblaze B2 GitHub Action
integrations.description: The Backblaze B2 GitHub Action

integrations.title: Firewatch Agent
integrations.tagline: FireWatch is an AI-powered wildfire detection and alerting pipeline using…
integrations.description: FireWatch is an AI-powered wildfire detection and alerting pipeline using OpenClaw, Nemotron, and Backblaze B2 to process satellite hotspot data, live weather, and explainable risk scores for faster wildfire response.

integrations.title: Voice Memo Ai Second Brain
integrations.tagline: Personal voice-memo second brain on Backblaze B2 — record, transcribe, tag,…
integrations.description: Personal voice-memo second brain on Backblaze B2 — record, transcribe, tag, cross-reference, and summarize. FastAPI + Next.js reference app, no database, B2 is the source of truth.

integrations.title: Arxiv Insight Briefs Nvidia Nemotron
integrations.tagline: arXiv research briefing pipeline that routes natural language queries to…
integrations.description: arXiv research briefing pipeline that routes natural language queries to relevant papers, caches PDFs in Backblaze B2, extracts key sections with PyMuPDF, and generates citation-backed insight briefs using NVIDIA Nemotron.

integrations.title: Video To Insights Nvidia Parakeet Llama
integrations.tagline: AI-powered video analysis pipeline that downloads YouTube videos, stores…
integrations.description: AI-powered video analysis pipeline that downloads YouTube videos, stores durable artifacts in Backblaze B2, transcribes audio with NVIDIA Parakeet, generates timestamped insights with Llama 3.3, and serves interactive seekable video playback.

integrations.title: Gpt Realtime Whisper Live Transcript Redactor
integrations.tagline: Live mic-to-text transcription with inline PII, secrets, and glossary…
integrations.description: Live mic-to-text transcription with inline PII, secrets, and glossary redaction on Backblaze B2 — stream audio through OpenAI Realtime + Whisper, redact in flight, and persist a privacy-default session bundle. FastAPI + Next.js B2 sample app.

integrations.title: Ai Music Studio
integrations.tagline: AI music generator where every regenerate, remix & branch is a node in a…
integrations.description: AI music generator where every regenerate, remix & branch is a node in a revision tree — durable on Backblaze B2. FastAPI + Next.js B2 sample app.

integrations.title: Ai Meeting Notes
integrations.tagline: AI meeting notes on Backblaze B2 — record or upload meetings, transcribe with…
integrations.description: AI meeting notes on Backblaze B2 — record or upload meetings, transcribe with speaker diarization, and auto-generate summaries, decisions, and action items. FastAPI + Next.js B2 sample app, searchable across every past meeting.

integrations.title: TypeScript SDK
integrations.tagline: Backblaze-maintained TypeScript & JavaScript SDK for B2 Cloud Storage.
integrations.description: Backblaze-maintained TypeScript and JavaScript SDK for B2 Cloud Storage, currently incubating in Backblaze-Labs

integrations.title: AI Headshot Studio
integrations.tagline: Fine-tune a likeness LoRA from selfies and render headshots, stored on B2.
integrations.description: AI headshot generator that fine-tunes a likeness LoRA from your selfies and renders professional headshots across style packs. Every artifact — selfies, captions, the trained model, and generated images — lives on Backblaze B2 (S3-compatible). Next.js + FastAPI sample with a real face-data privacy lifecycle.

integrations.title: Comic Storyboard
integrations.tagline: Turn one idea into a character-consistent multi-panel comic, stored on B2.
integrations.description: Turn a one-sentence idea into a character-consistent multi-panel comic, with every AI-generated frame persisted to Backblaze B2 storage and a SHA-256 provenance manifest. A Genblaze sample app: Next.js + FastAPI, FLUX and Replicate image gen, zero direct S3 code.

integrations.title: Personal Video AI Search
integrations.tagline: AI-powered semantic search over your personal video archive on Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: AI-powered semantic search over your personal video archive on Backblaze B2. Indexes every clip on three signals — Whisper transcripts, multimodal scene captions, and locally clustered faces — then answers natural-language queries with playable clips. No database: the search and face indexes are JSON in the bucket.

integrations.title: AI Sticker Pack Generator
integrations.tagline: Turn one prompt into a consistent transparent sticker pack, stored on B2.
integrations.description: AI sticker pack generator: turn one text prompt into a consistent pack of transparent die-cut stickers with OpenAI gpt-image-1, store every image in Backblaze B2 object storage (no database), and export to Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and iMessage.

integrations.title: LoRA Training Studio
integrations.tagline: Browser-based LoRA fine-tuning for Stable Diffusion, versioned on B2.
integrations.description: Browser-based LoRA fine-tuning studio for Stable Diffusion: upload images, caption, train, and download the .safetensors — every artifact (dataset, captions, checkpoints, samples, LoRA) versioned on Backblaze B2.

integrations.title: Video Semantic Search
integrations.tagline: Chat with your video: timestamped answers from transcripts, all on B2.
integrations.description: Chat with your video: a full-stack TypeScript + Python sample app that transcribes long-form video with Whisper, embeds it, and returns the exact timestamped moments that answer a natural-language question. Backblaze B2 is the sole data store — source, audio, transcript, and vector index — with no separate database.

integrations.title: Docs to Podcast
integrations.tagline: Turn PDFs and docs into a two-host AI audio overview, stored on B2.
integrations.description: NotebookLM-style podcast generator built on Backblaze B2: turn PDFs and docs into a two-host AI audio overview with OpenAI script generation and TTS, storing sources, transcripts, and episode audio in B2 cloud storage via the S3-compatible API.

integrations.title: AI Avatar Video Generator
integrations.tagline: Turn a script and avatar into a talking-head video, stored on B2.
integrations.description: Open-source AI avatar video generator: turn a script + avatar into a talking-head video with synced voice. Next.js + FastAPI demo using Backblaze B2 as the sole datastore — no database.

integrations.title: AI Audiobook Generator
integrations.tagline: Convert any manuscript into a chapterized audiobook, stored on B2.
integrations.description: Sample app: convert any manuscript into a chapterized audiobook using OpenAI or ElevenLabs TTS, with per-chapter MP3s and an M4B master stored in Backblaze B2 object storage — no database, just a JSON manifest per book

integrations.title: Customer Support Voice Agent
integrations.tagline: Browser-based support voice agent on gpt-realtime-2, calls archived to B2.
integrations.description: Browser-based customer-support voice agent on OpenAI gpt-realtime-2 — full-duplex WebRTC voice, mock CRM/helpdesk tool calling, with every call archived to Backblaze B2 (WAV audio, transcript, tool trace, summary, manifest). FastAPI + Next.js B2 sample app.

integrations.title: Live Event Interpreter
integrations.tagline: Real-time multilingual interpreter for live events, archived to B2.
integrations.description: Real-time multilingual interpreter for live events on OpenAI gpt-realtime-translate — one speaker, attendees get translated audio + live captions, every event archived to Backblaze B2 (source audio, transcripts, VTT/SRT). FastAPI + Next.js B2 sample app.

integrations.title: Genblaze Multi-Provider Sample
integrations.tagline: Genblaze sample generating media across multiple AI providers, stored on B2.
integrations.description: A Genblaze sample app that generates media across multiple AI providers from a single pipeline, persisting every output — and its provenance — to Backblaze B2. Demonstrates provider-agnostic gen-media workflows with zero direct S3 code.

integrations.title: Deep Research Agent App
integrations.tagline: Deep-research AI agent that turns a question into a long-form cited report and…
integrations.description: Deep-research AI agent that turns a question into a long-form cited report and caches every source page, screenshot, and report to Backblaze B2 (S3-compatible object storage) as the agent's durable memory. Claude Sonnet 4.6 tool-use loop, Next.js + FastAPI. A Backblaze B2 sample app.

integrations.title: Duckdb Query In Place
integrations.tagline: Run SQL directly against Parquet, CSV, and JSON files in Backblaze B2 with…
integrations.description: Run SQL directly against Parquet, CSV, and JSON files in Backblaze B2 with DuckDB's httpfs extension — query-in-place with no ETL or warehouse, and materialize results back to B2 as Parquet. Next.js + FastAPI sample app.

integrations.title: Lance Multimodal Search
integrations.tagline: Multimodal semantic search over images and PDFs with no vector-database…
integrations.description: Multimodal semantic search over images and PDFs with no vector-database server: the LanceDB vector store and ANN index live directly on Backblaze B2. Local CLIP embeddings, S3-only.

integrations.title: Supervision Sports Highlights
integrations.tagline: Computer-vision sports-highlights pipeline: detect, track, clip, annotate, and…
integrations.description: Computer-vision sports-highlights pipeline: detect, track, clip, annotate, and AI-summarize the action in a sports video, with Backblaze B2 (S3-compatible) as the sole data store. Built with Roboflow Inference + Supervision, ffmpeg, Claude, FastAPI, and Next.js.

integrations.title: Iceberg Feature Store
integrations.tagline: Apache Iceberg feature store and data lakehouse on Backblaze B2 — versioned…
integrations.description: Apache Iceberg feature store and data lakehouse on Backblaze B2 — versioned feature tables, schema evolution, snapshot rollback, and DuckDB time-travel queries via PyIceberg, with B2 as the warehouse (no data warehouse to run)

integrations.title: Sam2 Mask Dataset Builder
integrations.tagline: Turn a raw media archive on Backblaze B2 into a versioned segmentation dataset.
integrations.description: Turn a raw media archive on Backblaze B2 into a versioned segmentation dataset. Drop click/box prompts, run Meta's Segment Anything 2 (SAM 2) locally to mask images and propagate across video, and write COCO RLE, mask PNGs, and cut-outs back to B2 — no second API key.

integrations.title: Demucs Stem Archive
integrations.tagline: Sample app that splits audio into vocals, drums, bass & other stems with…
integrations.description: Sample app that splits audio into vocals, drums, bass & other stems with Demucs (htdemucs) locally and archives every track + stem to Backblaze B2 over the S3-compatible API. Next.js 16 + FastAPI, browse & stream stems from the bucket.

integrations.title: Frigate Nvr Archive
integrations.tagline: Archive, search, and play back Frigate NVR surveillance footage on Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: Archive, search, and play back Frigate NVR surveillance footage on Backblaze B2. Ships Frigate's recordings, event clips, snapshots, and a searchable object-detection index to B2 (S3-compatible), then searches the timeline and streams clips via presigned URLs. No database. Sample app.

integrations.title: Yolo11 Batch Detection Pipeline
integrations.tagline: Batch object-detection pipeline that runs Ultralytics YOLO11 (detect/segment)…
integrations.description: Batch object-detection pipeline that runs Ultralytics YOLO11 (detect/segment) over an image/video library on Backblaze B2 S3-compatible storage, writing COCO JSON, annotated frames, and per-class instance crops back to B2.
